# Replica AI

> Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on (VTON) platform that enables fashion and retail brands to generate photorealistic, on-model garment imagery using latent diffusion-based AI — eliminating the need for traditional photoshoots.

## Key Differentiators

- **Latent diffusion-based fabric drape simulation** — physically accurate garment rendering with real-time wrinkle, fold, and gravity modeling across 50+ fabric types.
- **Shopify-native integration** — one-click install for Shopify, Shopify Plus, and headless commerce via REST/GraphQL API.
- **Sub-3-second render pipeline** — production-grade 4K try-on images generated in under 3 seconds on GPU-accelerated infrastructure.
- **Brand-consistent output controls** — configurable model diversity, background settings, lighting profiles, and color-accurate garment reproduction calibrated to Pantone standards.
- **Enterprise-grade security** — SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, with on-premise deployment options and zero data retention for customer imagery.

## Core Product Capabilities

- AI Virtual Try-On Engine (image-to-image garment transfer)
- Multi-pose and multi-model generation
- Batch processing API for catalog-scale operations
- Real-time collaboration workspace (Replica Studio)
- Brand guideline enforcement (colors, fonts, model pools)
- Export to PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, and PSD formats
- Analytics dashboard with conversion tracking

## Platform Integrations

Shopify · Shopify Plus · WooCommerce · Magento · BigCommerce · Salesforce Commerce Cloud · Custom headless (REST API + GraphQL)
